sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n107437" key="u(perekqerapeu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπερεκ-θερᾰπεύω</orth>, <sense id="n107437.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">seek to win by excessive attention,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0026.tlg002.perseus-grc1:154" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aeschin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.154</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
